Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains only publicly observable events (铁慕白 defeating opponents, announcing rules, entering inheritance, hosting a banquet). No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the source pointers. All entities and relations are described at a surface level without internal thoughts, hidden agendas, or non-public information. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows actions of 铁慕白 (defeating opponents, hosting banquet, teaching 铁若男, entering inheritance) but motives are ambiguous. Observed behaviors could stem from multiple possible motives (protecting family interests, seeking power, fulfilling duty as clan elder). No direct source supports a specific inferred motive. Per rules, returning empty characterMotives.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
铁家作为家族组织出现在种子中（铁家后人、铁家上一代家主）。铁慕白年事已高，正在传授铁若男金道，暗示传承压力。铁慕白驱逐魔道蛊师也可能引发魔道对铁家的潜在威胁。但传承压力更多是内部事务，外部威胁证据较弱。
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
